title: Lightened armor
description: Resource pack that cuts most armors to diamond armor in shape, including netherite armor item textures.
body:
## Another armor resource pack
### What it does?
This resourcepack retextures most armor's so it looks like diamond armor set in shape.
Also it makes netherite armor pieces (items) look like other armor pieces.
### Everything retextured by this resource pack (as of Lightened armor 0.7)
- Armor layers (1 & 2)
  - Copper
  - Gold
  - Iron
  - Leather
  - Netherite
- Netherite pieces (items)
  - Netherite helmet
  - Netherite boots
  
This resourcepack does NOT fully retexture armor, no recolored diamond armor types.

Regulared netherite armor versions retexture ONLY netherite armor
